/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/NTW/LDTR:06-30-22 (30THDAY)/ACM/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO CONTACT ACM THREE TIMES A WEEK AND TO CONTINUE WITH MEDICAL TREATMENT AT WARD 81, SERVICES TO INCLUDE DRUG COUNSELING//X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE ANDIS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORDAND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SAORD/SA1:GEYLING RAMOS/SA1:VICTOR MANUEL O/SA1:EMANUEL O/SA2:2 BAYSIDE VILLAGE PLACE,SF/SAORD3/CONTD:JURY TRIAL ON 06-22-22/DOP/
